# Load the hadiths JSON file
import json, sys, os, re
path = "/mnt/data/file-GTpsjEG93EG6BAuDqWqgAJ-six_hadith_books.json"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    data = json.load(f)
len(data), type(data)[:100] if isinstance(data, list) else "not list"[:100]

# show keys of first entry
data[0].keys()

# Define normalization
import re
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]')
tatweel = '\u0640'
def normalize_ar(text):
    if text is None:
        return ""
    s = str(text)
    s = s.replace(tatweel, '')
    # remove diacritics
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub('', s)
    # unify hamza variants: map 'أ','إ','آ' to 'ا' and 'ى' to 'ي', 'ؤ'->و? But keep  ؤ maybe map to و, ئ->ي, ة->ه? Not sure.
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ى','ي').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي')
    # remove punctuation and parentheses etc.
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\u0600-\u06FF]+', ' ', s) # keep Arabic letters and underscores? \w includes underscore/Latin digits; ok.
    # collapse spaces and lowercase: Arabic has no case.
    s = re.sub(r'\s+',' ', s).strip()
    return s

# Build normalized list entries mapping index to normalized hadith text
norms = []
for i, entry in enumerate(data):
    text = entry.get('hadithTxt') or entry.get('Matn') or ''
    norms.append(normalize_ar(text))

# Normalize the FULL substring
full_sub = "إن الله حرم تحريمًا إلى يوم القيامة، فمن حاد حاد حائداً، وإنما أهلك من كان قبلكم أنهم إذا سرق فيهم الشريف تركوه، وإذا سرق فيهم الضعيف أقاموا عليه الحد، وألا تقتل نفس ظلما إلا كان على ابن آدم الأول كفل من دمها، لأنه كان أول من سن القتل"
norm_full = normalize_ar(full_sub)
norm_full[:200], len(norm_full)

# find indices where norm contains 'ان الله حرم' or startswith
query = normalize_ar("إن الله حرم تحريما إلى يوم القيامة")
matches = []
for i, n in enumerate(norms):
    if 'ان الله حرم' in n:
        matches.append(i)
len(matches), matches[:20]

# show candidate texts
for idx in matches[:40]:
    t = data[idx].get('hadithTxt') or data[idx].get('Matn')
    print("Index:", idx, "hadithID:", data[idx].get('hadithID'), "BookID:", data[idx].get('BookID'))
    print(t)
    print("-"*80)

queries = [
    "فمن حاد حاد حائداً",
    "انما اهلك من كان قبلكم",
    "اذا سرق فيهم الشريف تركوه",
    "اذا سرق فيهم الضعيف اقاموا عليه الحد",
    "الا تقتل نفس ظلما الا كان على ابن ادم الاول كفل من دمها",
    "لانه كان اول من سن القتل"
]
for q in queries:
    nq = normalize_ar(q)
    hits = [i for i,n in enumerate(norms) if nq in n]
    print(q, "->", len(hits), "hits:", hits[:20])

indices = set([18133,33655,3400,3648,4188,11866,11867,19992,19994,19995,19996,19997,19998,25218,27620,33163,11835])
for idx in sorted(indices):
    if idx < len(data):
        text = data[idx].get('hadithTxt') or data[idx].get('Matn')
        print("Index:", idx, "hadithID:", data[idx].get('hadithID'), "BookID:", data[idx].get('BookID'))
        print(text)
        print("-"*120)

q = normalize_ar("إن الله حرم تحريما إلى يوم القيامة")
hits = [i for i,n in enumerate(norms) if normalize_ar("ان الله حرم تحريما الي يوم القيامة") in n]
len(hits), hits[:20]

q = normalize_ar("تحريم الى يوم القيامة")
candidates = [i for i,n in enumerate(norms) if 'تحريم' in n and 'يوم القيامة' in n]

for idx in candidates[:40]:

# print Matn for some indices

# search for 'حائدا' 'حاأ' etc
q='حائداً'
nq = normalize_ar(q)
hits = [i for i,n in enumerate(norms) if 'حائدا' in n or 'حائداً' in n]
len(hits), hits[:50]

hits = [i for i,n in enumerate(norms) if 'حاد' in n]
len(hits), hits[:50]

# Prepare candidate combining matn of indices 11866 and 11835
matn_ahlik = data[11866].get('Matn') or data[11866].get('hadithTxt')
matn_katl = data[11835].get('Matn') or data[11835].get('hadithTxt')
candidate = (matn_ahlik.strip() + " " + matn_katl.strip())
full = "إن الله حرم تحريمًا إلى يوم القيامة، فمن حاد حاد حائداً، وإنما أهلك من كان قبلكم أنهم إذا سرق فيهم الشريف تركوه، وإذا سرق فيهم الضعيف أقاموا عليه الحد، وألا تقتل نفس ظلما إلا كان على ابن آدم الأول كفل من دمها، لأنه كان أول من سن القتل"

# normalize both
norm_candidate = normalize_ar(candidate)
norm_full = normalize_ar(full)

# compute token overlap F1
cand_tokens = norm_candidate.split()
full_tokens = norm_full.split()
overlap = set(cand_tokens) & set(full_tokens)
# But token overlap set disregards multiplicity. Better compute multiset overlap.
from collections import Counter
cand_counts = Counter(cand_tokens)
full_counts = Counter(full_tokens)
common = sum(min(cand_counts[t], full_counts.get(t,0)) for t in cand_counts)
precision = common / len(cand_tokens) if len(cand_tokens)>0 else 0
recall = common / len(full_tokens) if len(full_tokens)>0 else 0
f1 = 2*precision*recall/(precision+recall) if (precision+recall)>0 else 0
len(cand_tokens), len(full_tokens), common, precision, recall, f1, norm_candidate[:200], norm_full[:200]

# search normalized Matn for pattern 'انما اهلك' (normalize and check if contains)
pattern = normalize_ar("إنما أهلك الذين قبلكم")
hits = []
for i, entry in enumerate(data):
    matn = entry.get('Matn') or ''
    if normalize_ar("انما اهلك") in normalize_ar(matn):
        hits.append(i)
len(hits), hits[:30]
print(data[3400]['Matn'])

# Find the substring within data[3400]['Matn'] that corresponds to the direct quote
matn_3400 = data[3400]['Matn']
# locate 'إِنَّمَا أَهْلَكَ' and get until 'أَقَامُوا عَلَيْهِ الْحَدَّ'
start = matn_3400.find("إِنَّمَا أَهْلَكَ")
end = matn_3400.find("أَقَامُوا عَلَيْهِ الْحَدَّ")
start, end, matn_3400[start:end+len("أَقَامُوا عَلَيْهِ الْحَدَّ")] if start!=-1 and end!=-1 else None

subphrase = matn_3400[start:end+len("أَقَامُوا عَلَيْهِ الْحَدَّ")]
matn_11835 = data[11835]['Matn']
candidate2 = subphrase + " " + matn_11835
# normalize and compute token F1
nc = normalize_ar(candidate2)
nf = normalize_ar(full)
ctokens = nc.split()
ftokens = nf.split()
from collections import Counter
ccount = Counter(ctokens)
fcount = Counter(ftokens)
common = sum(min(ccount[t], fcount.get(t,0)) for t in ccount)
precision = common / len(ctokens)
recall = common / len(ftokens)
f1 = 2*precision*recall/(precision+recall) if (precision+recall)>0 else 0
len(ctokens), len(ftokens), common, precision, recall, f1, nc[:300], nf[:300]

matn_10726 = data[10726]['Matn']
subphrase = matn_3400[start:end+len("أَقَامُوا عَلَيْهِ الْحَدَّ")]

nc3 = normalize_ar(candidate3)

from collections import Counter
ccount3 = Counter(ctokens3)
fcount = Counter(ftokens)

precision3 = common3 / len(ctokens3)

f1_3 = 2*precision3*recall3/(precision3+recall3) if (precision3+recall3)>0 else 0
len(ctokens3), len(ftokens), common3, precision3, recall3, f1_3, nc3[:400], nf[:400]

# Search for entries containing both 'اهلك' and 'ابن ادم' or 'لا تقتل'
matches=[]
for i,entry in enumerate(data):
    matn = entry.get('Matn') or ''

# search for exact normalized phrase in Matn or hadithTxt
norm_query = normalize_ar("إن الله حرم تحريما إلى يوم القيامة")
matches = []
for i,entry in enumerate(data):

# Compute similarity between Matn[3400] and full
cand = data[3400]['Matn']
ncand = normalize_ar(cand)
nfull = normalize_ar(full)
from collections import Counter
cand_tokens = ncand.split()
